text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! Cinderella or not, I shall<n>cut down,
crush, and blast into<n>oblivion all opposition!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There is a beauty that surpasses<n>Cinderella's. It
is that of I! T.M. Opera<n>O!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: My prince... Oh, how beautiful you are!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O holds nothing back and<n>defeats
Meisho Doto.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She may try to adopt the air of a<n>prince, but the
Overlord comes<n>through loud and clear. Nothing
new<n>there.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh... I'm sorry. I finally challenged<n>you in a race,
but I couldn't put up a<n>good fight.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
At the very last minute... all I could<n>think was how I
can't possibly win.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Your ego fails to be the source of<n>your effort. That
may be your weak<n>point, Doto.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: So find your source in me!Strengthen yourself and strive torouse my competitive spirit!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Do it for you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! You wish to become my eternal<n>adversary,
do you not? In which<n>case...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You must forget yourself and charge<n>ahead
unflinchingly! Just like the<n>others have done!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
They look around to see the other<n>racers staring
them down with malice<n>in their eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems Opera O recognizes she was<n>their target
after all.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wow, everyone's faces... Their<n>eyes... They all
look so intense...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But can I really be like that? Could I<n>ever look at
you that way?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hear me well, Doto. I have already<n>declared that
I'm moving my pieces<n>on the board toward the
Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You have until then to consider<n>whether or not you
wish to become<n>my eternal adversary.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Let us be off, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Opera O turns and leaves the track<n>without batting
an eye to the<n>numerous hateful stares aimed at
her.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A task yet remains for Doto, just as<n>a task yet
remains for us.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I may have prevailed over her... but I<n>fell a breath
short of claiming the<n>spotlight. Do you know why?
choice_data_list: You felt the pressure on you?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...Indeed. Heh, you never miss a beat.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It proved quite difficult to run like the<n>Overlord
whilst in the sights of every<n>racer there.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha. Saw through that as well, did<n>you? Of
course not. The path of a king<n>is no cakewalk!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: As the Overlord, I have to surpass<n>these walls.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We have until fall to contemplate the<n>difficulties.
With our heads put<n>together, we will find a
solution,<n>Trainer.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I shall arrive at the Japan Cup with all<n>the
majesty befitting a ruler for this<n>nation!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It seems the attack on the Overlord<n>that Grass
Wonder predicted has<n>become a real threat.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I have to find a way to help her push<n>through and
establish the foundation<n>for her dynasty.
